name: Ar-Rahman
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Rahman' 100 times after every farz prayer, Allah will remove heedlessness (negligence) and forgetfulness from his heart.
amal: Recite 100 times every day after Fajr. The heart will find peace.

name: Ar-Raheem
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Raheem' 100 times after the Fajr prayer, Allah will make everyone kind toward him.
amal: Recite 100 times after Fajr — you will gain the love of people.

name: Al-Malik
meaning: The Sovereign, the Absolute Ruler, King of kings
fazilat: Whoever regularly recites 'Ya Malik' every day after Fajr, Allah will grant him wealth and honor.

name: Al-Quddus
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Quddus' 100 times every day, his heart will remain pure from all kinds of anxiety and illness.
amal: 100 times every day — freedom from the diseases of the heart.

name: As-Salam
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Salam' 115 times before a sick person, Allah grants healing (shifa).
amal: Recite over the sick person and blow on them.

name: Al-Mu'min
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Mu'min' 631 times, Allah will keep him safe from all calamities.
amal: Recite in times of fear — you will gain security.

name: Al-Muhaymin
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Muhaymin' 115 times after praying 2 rakats following a bath, the heart becomes illuminated.

name: Al-Aziz
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Aziz' 40 times after Fajr every day for 40 days, Allah will make him dependent on no one.

name: Al-Jabbar
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Jabbar' 226 times every day will be protected from the oppression of tyrants.
amal: Recite to be saved from the hand of the oppressor.

name: Al-Mutakabbir
meaning: The Greatest, the Possessor of Majesty
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Mutakabbir' 10 times at the start of any task, Allah will be your helper.
amal: Recite 10 times before beginning a task.

name: Al-Khaliq
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Khaliq' 100 times before sleeping at night, Allah will send an angel who will worship on his behalf until the Day of Judgment and send him its reward.

name: Al-Bari'
fazilat: A childless woman who fasts for 7 days and recites 'Ya Bari' 21 times at the time of Iftar may hope to be blessed with a child.
amal: Regular recitation in the wish for a child.

name: Al-Musawwir
meaning: The Fashioner, the Shaper of forms
fazilat: Fasting for 7 days and blowing over water 21 times at the time of Iftar and then drinking it is beneficial for those wishing for a child.
amal: Recite over water at the time of Iftar and drink it.

name: Al-Ghaffar
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Ghaffar' 100 times after the Jumu'ah prayer, sins are forgiven.

name: Al-Qahhar
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Qahhar' subdues the desires of the self (the cravings of the nafs) and reduces greed for the world.
amal: Recite to gain victory over the nafs.

name: Al-Wahhab
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Wahhab' 100 times after Tahajjud for 3 or 7 days, Allah accepts one's supplications.
amal: Recite along with dua after Tahajjud.

name: Ar-Razzaq
meaning: The Provider, the Giver of sustenance
fazilat: Standing at the four corners of the house before Fajr and reciting 'Ya Razzaq' 10 times at each, brings blessing (barakah) in sustenance.
amal: Recite at the four corners of the house in the morning.

name: Al-Fattah
meaning: The Opener, the Giver of great victory
fazilat: Placing your hand on your chest in the morning and reciting 'Ya Fattah' 70 times, the heart becomes illuminated and success comes in one's work.
amal: 70 times in the morning with your hand on your chest.

name: Al-'Alim
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya 'Alim' regularly, Allah grants knowledge and wisdom.

name: Al-Qabid
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Qabid' for 40 days makes hunger and want bearable.

name: Al-Basit
fazilat: Whoever, after the Chasht (Duha) prayer, raises his hands and recites 'Ya Basit' 10 times and then wipes his hands over his face, his poverty will be removed.
amal: Recite it after the Chasht (Duha) prayer.

name: Al-Khafid
fazilat: Whoever fasts for 3 days and on the 4th day recites 'Ya Khafid' 70 times, the plots of his enemies will be destroyed.

name: Ar-Rafi'
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Rafi'' 100 times daily, his honor and dignity among people will increase.

name: Al-Mu'izz
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Mu'izz' 140 times on Monday or Friday night will become honored in the eyes of people.

name: Al-Mudhill
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Mudhill' 75 times in prostration (sujood) will be protected from the oppression of tyrannical enemies.

name: As-Sami'
fazilat: Whoever, on Thursday at the time of Chasht (Duha), recites 'Ya Sami'' 100 times without speaking to anyone, his dua will be accepted.
amal: Recite it for the acceptance of dua.

name: Al-Basir
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Basir' 100 times after the Jumu'ah prayer, his eyesight will remain good and his inner vision (insight) will open.

name: Al-Hakam
fazilat: Whoever performs wudu at night and keeps reciting 'Ya Hakam', hidden knowledge will unfold in his heart.
amal: Recite it at night while in a state of wudu.

name: Al-'Adl
fazilat: Whoever writes 'Al-'Adl' on paper on Jumu'ah night, recites it 20 times, and keeps it with him, everyone will obey him.

name: Al-Latif
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Latif' 133 times in difficulty or crisis, Allah will soon open an easy way out.

name: Al-Khabir
fazilat: Through regular recitation, insight into hidden matters is born.

name: Al-Halim
fazilat: If written on paper and placed in land or water, blessings come to the crops or the work.

name: Al-'Azim
fazilat: Whoever regularly recites 'Ya 'Azim', Allah will honor him in this world and the Hereafter.

name: Al-Ghafur
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Ghafur' abundantly during headache, fever, and the like, will find healing and his sins will be forgiven.
amal: For illness and the forgiveness of sins.

name: Ash-Shakur
fazilat: In physical weakness and restlessness, reciting it over water and drinking it after blowing on it is beneficial.

name: Al-'Ali
fazilat: The dignity and knowledge of one who constantly recites 'Ya 'Ali' increases.

name: Al-Kabir
fazilat: Reciting it 100 times for 7 days increases one's standing in society.

name: Al-Hafiz
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya Hafiz' will be protected from all dangers, enemies, and accidents.
amal: Recite it during travel and in danger.

name: Al-Muqit
fazilat: Reciting it when hungry or in times of scarcity of livelihood, Allah makes provision (rizq) easy.

name: Al-Hasib
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Hasbiyallahul-Hasib' 70 times from Thursday evening until Friday evening will be protected from theft and robbery.

name: Al-Jalil
fazilat: If one writes it with saffron on paper and keeps it with oneself, one attains honor and dignity.

name: Al-Karim
fazilat: If one recites 'Ya Karim' at the time of sleeping, Allah grants honor in this world and the Hereafter.

name: Ar-Raqib
fazilat: For the protection of family and wealth, recite it 7 times and blow.
amal: For the protection of family and wealth.

name: Al-Mujib
fazilat: If one recites 'Ya Mujib', duas are quickly accepted.

name: Al-Wasi'
fazilat: If one recites it during scarcity in provision, blessing comes.

name: Al-Hakim
fazilat: If one recites 'Ya Hakim' in difficult matters, one gains the right decision and wisdom.

name: Al-Wadud
fazilat: If a husband and wife recite it 1000 times over food, blow on it, and eat, their love increases.

name: Al-Majid
fazilat: With regular recitation, the heart is illuminated and honor increases.

name: Al-Ba'ith
fazilat: If one recites it 100 times with the hand on the chest before sleeping, the heart comes alive.

name: Ash-Shahid
fazilat: If one recites it while placing the hand on the head of a disobedient child or a rebellious spouse, there is hope for their reform.

name: Al-Haqq
fazilat: To recover a lost item, if one recites it facing the four directions, help comes.

name: Al-Wakil
fazilat: If one recites it during storms and lightning or in times of fear, Allah protects.
amal: In all affairs with tawakkul (trust in Allah).

name: Al-Qawi
fazilat: If one recites 'Ya Qawi' when confronting an enemy, victory is attained.

name: Al-Matin
fazilat: With regular recitation, character and faith become firm.

name: Al-Wali
fazilat: Allah makes the one who recites 'Ya Wali' His wali (friend).

name: Al-Hamid
fazilat: If one recites it 99 times, good character and praiseworthy qualities are attained.

name: Al-Muhsi
fazilat: If one recites it 20 times before an exam, calculation and memory improve.

name: Al-Mubdi'
fazilat: If one places the hand on the belly of a pregnant mother and recites it 99 times, the unborn child remains protected.

name: Al-Mu'id
fazilat: To recover a lost person or item, recite it 70 times at the four corners of the house.

name: Al-Muhyi
fazilat: In a serious illness, if one places the hand on the chest and recites it 7 times, healing comes.
amal: For the recovery of the sick.

name: Al-Mumit
fazilat: Reciting it in bed to subdue the wrongful desires of the nafs reduces the pull toward sin.

name: Al-Hayy
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyum' before a sick person brings swift recovery.

name: Al-Qayyum
fazilat: Reciting 'Hayyu Qayyum' together is regarded as Ism-e-A'zam — a special means for the acceptance of dua.

name: Al-Wajid
meaning: The Self-Sufficient / The One who finds all
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Wajid' over food brings blessing.

name: Al-Majid
fazilat: Recite it regularly for peace of heart.

name: Al-Wahid
fazilat: Sitting in seclusion and reciting 'Ya Wahid' 1000 times removes the fear from the heart.
amal: To gain focus and remove fear.

name: Al-Ahad
fazilat: Reciting it regularly at home lets one feel Allah's unseen help.

name: As-Samad
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Samad' many times in sujood for any need fulfills that need.
amal: To fulfill a need, in sujood.

name: Al-Qadir
fazilat: Recite 'Ya Qadir' 41 times to destroy the plots of the enemy.
amal: To be safe from the enemy's harm.

name: Al-Muqtadir
fazilat: Reciting it 20 times upon waking from sleep makes the day blessed.

name: Al-Muqaddim
meaning: The Expediter / The One who brings forward
fazilat: Reciting it 184 times in war or a contest brings victory.

name: Al-Mu'akhkhir
fazilat: Reciting it 100 times daily increases the love of Allah in the heart.

name: Al-Awwal
fazilat: Reciting it 40 times for 40 days lets the needy receive provision and the childless obtain a child.

name: Al-Akhir
fazilat: Reciting it regularly reduces attachment to this world and increases longing for the Hereafter.

name: Az-Zahir
fazilat: Reciting it 500 times after Jumu'ah brings the manifestation of noor (light) in the heart.

name: Al-Batin
fazilat: Reciting it 33 times, three times a day, brings inspiration about hidden matters.

name: Al-Wali
fazilat: Reciting it at home protects the home from calamity and the whisperings of Satan.

name: Al-Muta'ali
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Muta'ali' in an impossible task, Allah makes it easy.
amal: Recite it in a difficult task.

name: Al-Barr
fazilat: For the well-being of a child, recite it 7 times and blow.
amal: For the well-being of a child.

name: At-Tawwab
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Tawwab' in sujood while seeking forgiveness of sins brings the acceptance of repentance.

name: Al-Muntaqim
fazilat: If one recites this in prostration after the Jumu'ah prayer against an oppressor, Allah takes revenge on his behalf.

name: Al-'Afuww
fazilat: Whoever recites 'Ya 'Afuww' abundantly will have his sins forgiven.

name: Ar-Ra'uf
fazilat: If you recite it 10 times before an angry person, his anger will subside.

name: Malikul-Mulk
fazilat: Regular recitation brings honor and prosperity.

name: Dhul-Jalali wal-Ikram
meaning: The Lord of Majesty and Honor
fazilat: Whoever recites it daily becomes wealthy in this world and the Hereafter.

name: Al-Muqsit
fazilat: If there is conflict among children, reciting it 70 times restores harmony.

name: Al-Jami'
fazilat: Recite it to bring back a lost person or to reunite a separated family.

name: Al-Ghani
fazilat: Reciting it 1000 times daily removes poverty and brings contentment and independence to the heart.

name: Al-Mughni
fazilat: If you recite it 1000 times for 10 days, Allah grants wealth and riches.

name: Al-Mani'
fazilat: To remove household discord, recite it 20 times in bed.

name: Ad-Darr
fazilat: To be protected from the harm of enemies, recite it 100 times on Thursday night.

name: An-Nafi'
fazilat: If you recite it 41 times before setting out on a journey or task, success will come.

name: An-Nur
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Nur' along with Surah An-Nur causes the light of Allah to manifest in the heart.

name: Al-Hadi
fazilat: For seeking guidance, recite it abundantly in prostration.

name: Al-Badi'
fazilat: For an impossible task, reciting 'Ya Badi'as-Samawati wal-Ard' 70 times brings a solution.

name: Al-Baqi
fazilat: With regular recitation, one's deeds are prolonged and accepted.

name: Al-Warith
fazilat: Reciting it 100 times before sunrise brings worldly and spiritual inheritance.

name: Ar-Rashid
meaning: The Guide to the Right Path
fazilat: Reciting it 1000 times between Maghrib and Isha before a difficult decision helps one find the right path.

name: As-Sabur
fazilat: Reciting 'Ya Sabur' 3000 times in times of hardship brings patience and deliverance.
